mapper.select: SELECT ID, NAME, CATEGORY, RATING, MEMO, TO_CHAR(EAT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EAT_DATE, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATED_AT FROM FOOD ORDER BY ID DESC
SELECT ID, NAME, CATEGORY, RATING, MEMO, TO_CHAR(EAT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EAT_DATE, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATED_AT FROM FOOD WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FOOD ( ID, NAME, CATEGORY, RATING, MEMO, EAT_DATE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( FOOD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{name}, #{category}, #{rating}, #{memo}, TO_DATE(#{eatDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE FOOD SET NAME = #{name}, CATEGORY = #{category}, RATING = #{rating}, MEMO = #{memo}, EAT_DATE = TO_DATE(#{eatDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, NAME, CATEGORY, RATING, MEMO, TO_CHAR(EAT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EAT_DATE, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATED_AT FROM FOOD WHERE CATEGORY = #{category} ORDER BY ID DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ID, NAME, CATEGORY, RATING, MEMO, TO_CHAR(EAT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EAT_DATE, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATED_AT FROM FOOD ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
